THE
RIMA
BOX

High-end herb storage that deserves to be on display. Constructed from virtually indestructible high-gloss plexiglass, internally lined with premium velvet over laser-cut foam. Sealed with four powerful rare earth magnets.

WHAT'S
INSIDE.

  • 01
    Ceramic Coated Grinder Multi-chamber, stay-sharp ceramic blades. Never taints flavor.
  • 02
    Scentproof Glass Jar 1–4oz childproof jar. Holds up to 7g of flower.
  • 03
    Chalkboard Lid Write-on, wipe-off lid to label your strain.
